LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_General.label: General
LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_Jobs.label: Jobs
LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_Mechanoids.label: Mechanoids
LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_PennedAnimals.label: Penned Animals
LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_Power.label: Power
LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_Power.description: Allows tweaking the usage rate of some buildings.
LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_Research.label: Research
LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_ResearchProjects.de: Allows control over the cost and tech print needs of any given Research Project. Restarting the game is required to apply these settings.
LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_Resources.label: Resources
LanguageData.TweakSection_Vanilla_Resources.descripti: This will only function against vanilla versions of the raid types, some modded raids use their own version and will bypass these tweaks.

LanguageData.TweakSection_Anomaly_General.label: General
LanguageData.TweakSection_Royalty_Anima.label: Anima
LanguageData.TweakSection_AnomalyEntities.label: Entities
LanguageData.TweakSection_Ideology_Gauranlen.label: Gauranlen
LanguageData.TweakSection_Biotech_General.label: General
LanguageData.TweakSection_Biotech_Polux.label: Polux
LanguageData.TweakSection_Biotech_Genepacks.label: Genepacks
LanguageData.TweakSection_Royalty_RoyalTitles.label: Royal Titles
LanguageData.TweakSection_Royalty_RoyalPermits.label: Royal Permits
